summary: Strong, full‑sound audience recording with solid audio quality
review: Reviewers praise the Sennheiser microphones and describe the sound as strong and full, indicating a good-quality audience source. No comments were made about the musical performance itself, so the show’s musical merit cannot be assessed from this review.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review focused on recording quality, rating it 4 stars and highlighting strong sound; lack of any performance commentary limits confidence in overall show rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Strong full‑sound noted; reviewers love the Sennheiser mics from the 80s/90s, indicating clear and robust audio despite being an audience source.
